title: astragalus alpinus var. labradoricus
intro: Astragalus alpinus var. labradoricus, also known as Canadian milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the boreal forests of North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus alpinus var. labradoricus include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
